name: [Negative] App Experiences Woes
description: Users are overwhelmingly dissatisfied with Groww app due to various technical issues, high brokerage fees, and poor customer support, which ultimately results in financial losses and trust issues.

name: [Negative] App Issues and Crashes
description: Users have experienced multiple app crashes, technical issues, and glitches while using the Groww platform. This includes delays in transactions, incorrect price executions, and poor customer support. The app has also failed to execute orders at the correct price, resulting in significant losses for users.
